title: Shri Jagannath Nka Nabakalebara
overview: When a ruthless invader desecrates the sacred idols of Lord Jagannath, a fearless devotee and a rising young king embark on a divine mission to reclaim their faith and restore glory through the first Nabakalebara in history .
